headlines.title: List of Starship launches - Wikipedia
headlines.description: As of October 13, 2025, the SpaceX Starship has been launched 11 times, with 6 successes and 5 failures. The American company has developed Starship with the intention of lowering launch costs using economies of scale. It aims to achieve this by reusing both rocket stages, increasing payload ...

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO: How to buy SpaceX shares? | Stake
headlines.description: Other notable investors include Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), Fidelity, Alphabet ($GOOGL) and Sequoia Capital. SpaceX going public would arguably be the most widely anticipated IPO of our decade. Expectations around the company’s valuation are enormous, but reflective of SpaceX’s unique position within the space economy. SpaceX dominates the commercial orbital launch market with reusable Falcon 9 and Falcon Heavy rockets.

headlines.title: SpaceX - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn
headlines.description: SpaceX has raised a total funding of $11.9B over 31 rounds from 240 investors. Investors include Odenn Ventures, TrueBridge and 238 others. Their latest funding round was of Undisclosed on Jan 21, 2025 .

headlines.title: SpaceX's $350 Billion Warning Shot: Buy In, But Know We're About to Blow Up the Satellite Industry
headlines.description: The broader SpaceX entity, including its Falcon 9 and Starship rocket programs and its government contracts, has been valued at roughly $350 billion in recent secondary market transactions.

headlines.title: Launch Schedule - RocketLaunch.Live
headlines.description: Live coverage and the most up-to-date schedule of all upcoming orbital rocket launches, including SpaceX, ULA, Arianespace and others. Check back for live coverage on launch day!

headlines.title: SpaceX's monster IPO is unlike anything we've seen
headlines.description: Here are four ways this IPO is different from all others: 1. Size: SpaceX reportedly wants to raise around $75 billion at a $1.75 trillion valuation.

headlines.title: SpaceX Eyes Record-Breaking IPO — With a Sizable Share for Everyday Investors
headlines.description: After months of speculation, the company could file for a historic IPO as early as this week — seeking $75 billion in funding that would push the company’s value to $1.75 trillion.

headlines.title: Ahead of the SpaceX IPO, xAI Has Now Shed All 11 of Its Non-Elon Musk Founders
headlines.description: Two weeks ago, Elon Musk wrote on X that xAI—the AI company currently owned by SpaceX and on track for an IPO intended to be the largest ever—“was not built right first time around, so is being rebuilt from the foundations up.” The departures of about half of the co-founders were reported within days of SpaceX’s surprise acquisition of xAI back in February.

key_angle: SpaceX Starship progress accelerates IPO timeline expectations
